metadata.title: Build a Pareto Model-Selector with Claude Code

beats.narration_text: Hello. This is Liam, in for Bear. Benchmark accuracy lies to you. The leaderboard winner loses on your device — so plot the whole field and keep only the ones nothing beats on every axis.

props.command: claude "write pareto.py: given N models with (accuracy, latency_ms, flash_kb), compute the Pareto frontier and mark it; grey out dominated models."
props.segment: Build a Pareto Model-Selector with Claude Code
output: Pareto frontier: Model B (92%, 40ms), Model C (91%, 20ms)

beats.narration_text: From the book: the Pareto frontier for face-detection candidates. Our CLI selector builds this plot automatically for any model family you give it.

beats.act: MANIM — Model scatter plot: accuracy vs latency
beats.narration_text: Plot the whole field. Accuracy on y, latency on x — lower latency is better, higher accuracy is better. Model A: 94 percent, 80 milliseconds. Model B: 92 percent, 40 milliseconds. Model C: 91 percent, 20 milliseconds. All three are on the board. Now find out who actually wins.

A model is dominated if another model beats it on every axis simultaneously. Model A: 94 percent, 80 ms. Model B: 92 percent, 40 ms — almost as accurate and twice as fast. Model A is dominated by B on latency at nearly the same accuracy. Grey it out. It would never be the right choice given B exists.

The Pareto frontier connects the non-dominated survivors. Model B: 92 percent, 40 ms. Model C: 91 percent, 20 ms. Both make it — each is the best on one axis the other can't match. The frontier is your honest shortlist. Every model off it has a strictly better alternative.

Your turn. Ask Claude: write pareto.py — given N models each with accuracy, latency in milliseconds, and flash in kilobytes, compute the Pareto frontier and mark it, and grey out dominated models. This tool is the honest shortlist. Add a constraint mask that greys out anything over 250 milliseconds or 2 megabytes before computing the frontier — those models don't even qualify.

props.command: claude "write pareto.py: given N models with (accuracy, latency_ms, flash_kb), compute the Pareto frontier and mark it; grey out dominated models."

props.title: Build a Pareto Model-Selector with Claude Code
props.subline: embedded ai · liam, in for bear
